About
We build the world’s most powerful quantum processors
![Scientist wearing glasses and black gloves adjusting a quantum computer in a lab with blue lighting.](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68ef71c634061d6e61fc1629/6925bb0dcc28e5683de5f927_6c363e4f5f0f437a2ee2b922108353b0_IMG_9801%20%281%29.avif)
QuantWare is the dedicated quantum processor company. Founded in 2021 by Matt Rijlaarsdam and Alessandro Bruno as a spinout from QuTech at TU Delft, the company designs, fabricates, and integrates quantum processors on VIO™ — the QPU architecture to scale superconducting qubits to utility-scale quantum computing — for the entire ecosystem. QuantWare has shipped more quantum processors than any other commercial supplier, serving more than 50 customers across 20 countries.   
  
QuantWare is funded by investors including Intel Capital and In-Q-Tel and is headquartered in Delft, the Netherlands.

Scott White
Chair of Board
[](https://www.linkedin.com/in/scott-white-6619a3/)[](https://quantware.com/about)
Bio
Scott White is an experienced serial entrepreneur, with direct involvement in 11 technology start-ups and scale-ups. He is an advisor at several venture investors, and a member of the UK Government's Semiconductor Advisory Panel. In 2010, Scott founded Pragmatic Semiconductor, which he built into the world leader in flexible semiconductors, with over 300 staff and the UK’s first ever state-of-the-art 300mm wafer fab. Scott raised more than $400 million for Pragmatic, including the largest ever European semiconductor venture round of more than $240 million. In his free time, he likes to run ultra marathons.

Matthijs co-founded QuantWare and has since grown it into the world's leading quantum processor maker. He has a background in computer science and quantum information, with research experience in quantum simulation at QuTech. 
As CEO, Matthijs drives QuantWare's strategic direction and growth, bridging deep-tech innovation with real-world industrial scalability. He is also a member of the TechChampions. In his free time, he loves hiking in the mountains.

Dr. Rami Barends is a leading figure in quantum computing research and a scientific advisor to QuantWare. He is an author of the landmark Google Quantum Supremacy paper and serves as a lead researcher at Google Quantum AI. He is also a Director at the Peter Grünberg Institute, contributing to the global advancement of quantum technologies.

Bio
Professor Charles M. Marcus is an internationally recognized leader in quantum engineering. He previously served as Director of Microsoft Quantum, the Peter Grünberg Institute, and the Harvard Center for Nanoscale Systems. He is currently a professor at the Niels Bohr Institute and was the first non-Dane to receive the prestigious Ørsted Gold Medal.

Bio
With a background in quantum physics and superconducting qubit design, Marten has played a central role in the company’s QPU development. He brings a track record of innovation across aerospace, finance, and automotive, including his tenure as chief engineer of the Delft Solar Car Team, where he led the team to victory in the World Solar Challenge. As VP of R&D, Marten oversees technology development aimed at removing scaling bottlenecks and enabling QPUs to reach true utility scale.

[](https://www.linkedin.com/in/bart-segers-1615ba19a/)[](https://quantware.com/about)
Bio
Bart is QuantWare's Head of Marketing, responsible for bringing QuantWare's technological advancements known to the wider community. He holds a master's degree in Applied Physics from the TU Delft, and completed his thesis at QuTech in the group of Prof. Leo DiCarlo. Before joining QuantWare, he gained diverse experience — from teaching physics to high-school students to exploring hedging strategies for exchange rate volatility at a global currency fund — giving him a unique interdisciplinary perspective. In his free time, he likes to run and play squash.

Delft, the world's leading quantum hub
Our headquarters and KiloFab are located in Delft, at the heart of a global quantum hub, nearby Delft University of Technology and QuTech, the world’s best institute for quantum technologies. This industry ecosystem and talent hub accelerates our mission to deliver the world's most powerful quantum processors.

<!-- Swiper -->
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/swiper@12/swiper-bundle.min.css">
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/swiper@12/swiper-bundle.min.js"></script>

<style>
[data-scroll-margin] {
	scroll-margin-top: 6rem;
}

.hidden {
  opacity: 0 !important;
  height: 0 !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
  pointer-events: none !important;
}

/* Safari SVG fix */
svg {
  display: block;
  transform: translateZ(0);
}

/* Popup initial state */
[data-popup] {
  display: none;
  opacity: 0;
  will-change: transform, opacity;
}

/* Nav Product Panels */
.nav-dropdown .product-panel-info,
.nav-dropdown .product-panel__item,
.nav-dropdown .product-panel__item-inner {height: 100%}
.nav-dropdown .product-panel__item-inner {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: space-between;
}

/* News - media link */
[data-link-media] {color: var(--color--blue)}

/* Swiper styling */
.swiper-pagination-bullet.swiper-pagination-bullet-active {background: #000;}
button.swiper-navigation__button.swiper-button-disabled {opacity:20%;}


/* Product Page panel toggle styling */
.product-heading-w[data-reveal-toggle] {
    cursor: pointer;
}

/*———— NAV ESSENTIAL STYLING ———— */
:root {
  --nav-bg-height: calc(32em + calc(2em + 3em + 2.5em + 3em));
  --cubic-default: cubic-bezier(0.525, 0, 0, 1);
  --duration-fast: 0.2s;
  --duration-normal: 0.450s;
}

a {
  color: inherit;
  text-decoration: none;
}

a:focus-visible,
button:focus-visible {
  outline: 1px solid var(--ui--text-black);
}

.nav-bg {
  transition: height var(--duration-normal) var(--cubic-default);
}

.page-bg {
  transition: opacity var(--duration-fast) var(--cubic-default);
}

.nav {
  transition: color var(--duration-fast) var(--cubic-default);
}

.nav-button {
  transition: all var(--duration-fast) var(--cubic-default);
}

/* ———— SHOW DROPDOWN ———— */
.nav-dropdown {
  transition: all var(--duration-normal) ease, transform var(--duration-normal) var(--cubic-default);
}

[data-dropdown-toggle]:not([data-dropdown-toggle="closed"]):hover+.nav-dropdown,
[data-dropdown-toggle]:not([data-dropdown-toggle="closed"]):focus-visible+.nav-dropdown,
[data-dropdown-toggle]:not([data-dropdown-toggle="closed"])+.nav-dropdown:hover,
[data-dropdown-toggle]:not([data-dropdown-toggle="closed"])+.nav-dropdown:focus-within,
.wf-design-mode [data-dropdown-toggle="open"]+.nav-dropdown{
  opacity: 1;
  visibility: visible;
  pointer-events: auto;
}

/*———— STYLING WHEN DROPDOWN IS OPEN ———— */
:is(body:has([data-dropdown-toggle]:not([data-dropdown-toggle="closed"]):hover),
  body:has([data-dropdown-toggle]:not([data-dropdown-toggle="closed"]):focus-visible),
  body:has([data-dropdown-toggle]:not([data-dropdown-toggle="closed"]):focus-within),
  body:has([data-dropdown-toggle]:not([data-dropdown-toggle="closed"])+.nav-dropdown:hover),
  body:has([data-dropdown-toggle]:not([data-dropdown-toggle="closed"])+.nav-dropdown:focus-within)),
  .wf-design-mode body:has([data-dropdown-toggle="open"]){
  .nav-bg {
    height: var(--nav-bg-height);
  }

  .page-bg {
    opacity: 1;
  }

  .nav {
    color: var(--ui--text-black);
  }

  .nav-button {
    border-color: var(--color--blue);
    color: var(--ui--text-black);
  }

  .nav-button.is--primary {
    background-color: var(--color--blue);
    border-color: var(--color--blue);
    color: #FFF;
  }
}

[data-menu-status="open"] .nav-container {
  border-bottom: 1px solid #f7f7f900;
}

/*———— DROPDOWN TOGGLE ———— */
.nav-link__dropdown-icon {
  transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--cubic-default);
}

[data-dropdown-toggle] {
  transition: background-color var(--duration-fast) var(--cubic-default);
}

/*———— DESKTOP HOVER AND FOCUS ———— */
@media screen and (min-width: 992px) {

  [data-dropdown-toggle]:not([data-dropdown-toggle="closed"]):hover .nav-link__dropdown-icon,
  [data-dropdown-toggle]:not([data-dropdown-toggle="closed"]):focus .nav-link__dropdown-icon,
  [data-dropdown-toggle]:not([data-dropdown-toggle="closed"]):focus-within .nav-link__dropdown-icon,
  [data-dropdown-toggle]:not([data-dropdown-toggle="closed"]):has(+ .nav-dropdown:hover) .nav-link__dropdown-icon,
  [data-dropdown-toggle]:not([data-dropdown-toggle="closed"]):has(+ .nav-dropdown:focus-within) .nav-link__dropdown-icon {
    transform: rotate(180deg);
  }

  [data-dropdown-toggle]:not([data-dropdown-toggle="closed"]):hover,
  [data-dropdown-toggle]:not([data-dropdown-toggle="closed"]):focus,
  [data-dropdown-toggle]:not([data-dropdown-toggle="closed"]):focus-within,
  [data-dropdown-toggle]:not([data-dropdown-toggle="closed"]):has(+ .nav-dropdown:hover),
  [data-dropdown-toggle]:not([data-dropdown-toggle="closed"]):has(+ .nav-dropdown:focus-within),
  .wf-design-mode body:has([data-dropdown-toggle="open"])+.nav-dropdown{
    background-color: none;
  }

}

/*————  DROPDOWN CONTENT LIST ITEMS ———— */
.nav-dropdown__content-li {
  transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--cubic-default);
  transition-delay: 0.18s;
  opacity: 0;
  transform: translate(4em, 0px);
}

.nav-dropdown__content-li:nth-child(2) {
  transition-delay: 0.24s;
}

.nav-dropdown__content-li:nth-child(3) {
  transition-delay: 0.3s;
}

.nav-dropdown__content-li:nth-child(4) {
  transition-delay: 0.36s;
}

.nav-dropdown__content-li:nth-child(5) {
  transition-delay: 0.44s;
}

body:has([data-dropdown-toggle]:not([data-dropdown-toggle="closed"]):hover) [data-dropdown-toggle]:not([data-dropdown-toggle="closed"]):hover+.nav-dropdown .nav-dropdown__content-li,
body:has([data-dropdown-toggle]:not([data-dropdown-toggle="closed"]):focus-visible) .nav-dropdown__content-li,
body:has([data-dropdown-toggle]:not([data-dropdown-toggle="closed"]):focus-within) .nav-dropdown__content-li,
body:has([data-dropdown-toggle]:not([data-dropdown-toggle="closed"])+.nav-dropdown:hover) .nav-dropdown__content-li,
body:has([data-dropdown-toggle]:not([data-dropdown-toggle="closed"])+.nav-dropdown:focus-within) .nav-dropdown__content-li,
.wf-design-mode [data-dropdown-toggle="open"]+.nav-dropdown .nav-dropdown__content-li{
  opacity: 1;
  transform: translate(0em, 0px);
}


/* ———— NAV LINKS ———— */
a.nav-link .nav-link__label::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  left: 0;
  bottom: -1px;
  width: 100%;
  height: 1px;
  background: currentColor;
  transition: transform var(--duration-normal) var(--cubic-default);
  transform: scale(0, 1);
  transform-origin: right center;
}

a.nav-link:hover .nav-link__label::after,
a.nav-link:focus-visible .nav-link__label::after {
  transform: scale(1, 1);
  transform-origin: left center;
}

/* ———— MOBILE STATE WITH BURGER MENU ———— */
@media screen and (max-width: 991px) {
  :root {
    --nav-bg-height: 100dvh;
  }

  .nav-dropdown__overflow {
    transition: grid-template-rows var(--duration-normal) var(--cubic-default);
  }

  .nav-center {
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--cubic-default), opacity var(--duration-fast) var(--cubic-default);
  }

  .menu-button__line {
    transition: all var(--duration-normal) var(--cubic-default);
  }

  /* ———— STYLES WHEN MENU IS OPEN ———— */
  :is([data-menu-status="open"]) {
    color: var(--ui--text-black);

    .menu-button__line:nth-of-type(1) {
      transform: translate(0px, 0.25em) rotate(135deg);
      background-color: var(--ui--text-black);
    }

    .menu-button__line:nth-of-type(2) {
      transform: translate(0px, -0.25em) rotate(-135deg);
      background-color: var(--ui--text-black);
    }

    .nav-bg {
      height: var(--nav-bg-height);
    }

    .page-bg {
      opacity: 1;
    }

    .nav-button.is--primary {
      background-color: var(--color--blue);
      border-color: var(--color--blue);
      color: #FFF;
    }

    .nav-center {
      opacity: 1;
      visibility: visible;
      transform: translate(0px, 0em);
      transition-delay: 0.1s;
    }
  }

  [data-dropdown-toggle="open"]+.nav-dropdown .nav-dropdown__overflow {
    grid-template-rows: 1fr;
  }

  [data-dropdown-toggle="open"]+.nav-dropdown .nav-dropdown__content-li {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translate(0em, 0px);
  }

  [data-dropdown-toggle="open"] .nav-link__dropdown-icon {
    transform: rotate(180deg);
  }
}
</style>

<script>
function initNavigation() {
  if (!initNavigation._hasResizeListener) {
    initNavigation._hasResizeListener = true;
    window.addEventListener('resize', debounce(initNavigation, 200));
  }

  const isMobile = window.innerWidth < 992;
  if (isMobile && initNavigation._lastMode !== 'mobile') {
    initMobileMenu();
    initNavigation._lastMode = 'mobile';
  } else if (!isMobile && initNavigation._lastMode !== 'desktop') {
    initDesktopDropdowns();
    initNavigation._lastMode = 'desktop';
  }
}

function debounce(fn, delay) {
  let timer;
  return () => {
    clearTimeout(timer);
    timer = setTimeout(fn, delay);
  };
}

function initMobileMenu() {
  const btn = document.querySelector('[data-menu-button]');
  const nav = document.querySelector('[data-menu-status]');
  if (!btn || !nav) return;

  btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
  btn.setAttribute('aria-controls', 'mobile-navigation');
  nav.setAttribute('id', 'mobile-navigation');
  nav.setAttribute('role', 'navigation');
  nav.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Main navigation');

  if (!btn._mobileClick) {
    btn._mobileClick = true;
    btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
      const open = nav.dataset.menuStatus === 'open';
      nav.dataset.menuStatus = open ? 'closed' : 'open';
      btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', !open);

      // Close all dropdowns when closing the menu
      if (open) {
        Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[data-dropdown-toggle]')).forEach(toggle => {
          toggle.dataset.dropdownToggle = 'closed';
          toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
        });
      }
    });
  }

  Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[data-dropdown-toggle]')).forEach((toggle, i) => {
    const dd = toggle.nextElementSibling;
    if (!dd || !dd.classList.contains('nav-dropdown')) return;
    if (toggle._mobileDropdownInit) return;
    toggle._mobileDropdownInit = true;

    toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
    toggle.setAttribute('aria-haspopup', 'true');
    toggle.setAttribute('aria-controls', `dropdown-${i}`);
    
    dd.setAttribute('id', `dropdown-${i}`);
    dd.setAttribute('role', 'menu');
    dd.querySelectorAll('.nav-dropdown__link')
      .forEach(link => link.setAttribute('role', 'menuitem'));

    toggle.addEventListener('click', () => {
      const open = toggle.dataset.dropdownToggle === 'open';
      Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[data-dropdown-toggle]'))
        .forEach(other => {
          if (other !== toggle) {
            other.dataset.dropdownToggle = 'closed';
            other.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
            if (other === document.activeElement) other.blur();
          }
        });
      toggle.dataset.dropdownToggle = open ? 'closed' : 'open';
      toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', !open);
      if (open && toggle === document.activeElement) toggle.blur();
    });
  });
}

function initDesktopDropdowns() {
  const toggles = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[data-dropdown-toggle]'));
  const links = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.nav-link:not([data-dropdown-toggle])'));

  toggles.forEach((toggle, i) => {
    const dd = toggle.nextElementSibling;
    if (!dd || !dd.classList.contains('nav-dropdown') || toggle._desktopInit) return;
    toggle._desktopInit = true;

    toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
    toggle.setAttribute('aria-haspopup', 'true');
    toggle.setAttribute('aria-controls', `desktop-dropdown-${i}`);
    
    dd.setAttribute('id', `desktop-dropdown-${i}`);
    dd.setAttribute('role', 'menu');
    dd.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
    dd.querySelectorAll('.nav-dropdown__link')
      .forEach(link => link.setAttribute('role', 'menuitem'));

    toggle.addEventListener('click', e => {
      e.preventDefault();
      toggles.forEach(other => {
        if (other !== toggle) {
          other.dataset.dropdownToggle = 'closed';
          other.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
          const otherDropdown = other.nextElementSibling;
          if (otherDropdown) otherDropdown.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
        }
      });
      const open = toggle.dataset.dropdownToggle !== 'open';
      toggle.dataset.dropdownToggle = 'open';
      toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'true');
      dd.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false');
      if (open) {
        const first = dd.querySelector('.nav-dropdown__link');
        if (first) first.focus();
      }
    });

    toggle.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
      const anyOpen = toggles.some(x => x.dataset.dropdownToggle === 'open');
      toggles.forEach(other => {
        if (other !== toggle) {
          other.dataset.dropdownToggle = 'closed';
          other.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
          const otherDropdown = other.nextElementSibling;
          if (otherDropdown) otherDropdown.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
        }
      });
      if (anyOpen) {
        setTimeout(() => {
          toggle.dataset.dropdownToggle = 'open';
          toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'true');
          dd.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false');
        }, 20);
      } else {
        toggle.dataset.dropdownToggle = 'open';
        toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'true');
        dd.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false');
      }
    });

    dd.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
      toggle.dataset.dropdownToggle = 'closed';
      toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
      dd.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
    });

    toggle.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
      if (e.key === 'Enter' || e.key === ' ') {
        e.preventDefault();
        toggle.click();
      } else if (e.key === 'Escape') {
        toggle.dataset.dropdownToggle = 'closed';
        toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
        dd.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
        toggle.focus();
      }
    });

    dd.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
      const items = Array.from(dd.querySelectorAll('.nav-dropdown__link'));
      const idx = items.indexOf(document.activeElement);
      if (e.key === 'ArrowDown') {
        e.preventDefault();
        items[(idx + 1) % items.length].focus();
      } else if (e.key === 'ArrowUp') {
        e.preventDefault();
        items[(idx - 1 + items.length) % items.length].focus();
      } else if (e.key === 'Escape') {
        e.preventDefault();
        toggle.dataset.dropdownToggle = 'closed';
        toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
        dd.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
        toggle.focus();
      } else if (e.key === 'Tab' && !dd.contains(e.relatedTarget)) {
        toggle.dataset.dropdownToggle = 'closed';
        toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
        dd.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
      }
    });
  });

  links.forEach(link => {
    link.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
      toggles.forEach(toggle => {
        toggle.dataset.dropdownToggle = 'closed';
        toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
        const dd = toggle.nextElementSibling;
        if (dd) dd.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
      });
    });
  });

  document.addEventListener('click', e => {
    const inside = toggles.some(toggle => {
      const dd = toggle.nextElementSibling;
      return toggle.contains(e.target) || (dd && dd.contains(e.target));
    });
    if (!inside) {
      toggles.forEach(toggle => {
        toggle.dataset.dropdownToggle = 'closed';
        toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
        const dd = toggle.nextElementSibling;
        if (dd) dd.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
      });
    }
  });
}

// Initialize Multilevel Navigation
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  initNavigation();
});

class="text-size-regular">QuantWare is the dedicated quantum processor company. Founded in 2021 by Matt Rijlaarsdam and Alessandro Bruno as a spinout from QuTech at TU Delft, the company designs, fabricates, and integrates quantum processors on VIO™ — the QPU architecture to scale superconducting qubits to utility-scale quantum computing — for the entire ecosystem. QuantWare has shipped more quantum processors than any other commercial supplier, serving more than 50 customers across 20 countries. <br><br>QuantWare is funded by investors including Intel Capital and In-Q-Tel and is headquartered in Delft, the Netherlands.</div></div></div></div></div><div class="section-w"><div class="vertical-line-w hero"><div class="vertical-line blue-gradient"></div><div </svg></div></a></div></div><div class="people-item__bio-w"><div class="text-size-small">Bio</div><div class="text-size-regular w-richtext"><p>Scott White is an experienced serial entrepreneur, with direct involvement in 11 technology start-ups and scale-ups. He is an advisor at several venture investors, and a member of the UK Government's Semiconductor Advisory Panel. In 2010, Scott founded Pragmatic Semiconductor, which he built into the world leader in flexible semiconductors, with over 300 staff and the UK’s first ever state-of-the-art 300mm wafer fab. Scott raised more than $400 million for Pragmatic, including the largest ever European semiconductor venture round of more than $240 million. In his free time, he likes to run ultra marathons.</p><p>‍</p></div></div><a data-wf-native-id-path="39566151-72f7-7257-7483-0857e90b1b20_instance-0" data-wf-ao-click-engagement-tracking="true" data-wf-element-id="39566151-72f7-7257-7483-0857e90b1b20" data-wf-cms-context="%5B%7B%22collectionId%22%3A%2268ef71c634061d6e61fc166e%22%2C%22itemId%22%3A%2268ff339f25ab7595b5f28735%22%7D%5D" href="#" class="btn-icon modal w-inline-block"><div class="code-embed-2 w-embed"><svg width="11" height="11" viewBox="0 0 11 11" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

</svg></div></a></div></div><div class="people-item__bio-w"><div class="text-size-small">Bio</div><div class="text-size-regular w-richtext"><p>Aparna Prabhakar is a Board member at QuantWare and the Chief Strategy & Sustainability Officer for Schneider Electric’s $32B Energy Management business. She previously served as Vice President of IBM’s Quantum Ecosystem, where she launched IBM’s quantum business strategy and built a global network of more than 200 partners from the ground up. Aparna brings deep expertise in scaling frontier technologies, strategic leadership, and ecosystem development.</p></div></div><a data-wf-native-id-path="39566151-72f7-7257-7483-0857e90b1b20_instance-1" data-wf-ao-click-engagement-tracking="true" data-wf-element-id="39566151-72f7-7257-7483-0857e90b1b20" data-wf-cms-context="%5B%7B%22collectionId%22%3A%2268ef71c634061d6e61fc166e%22%2C%22itemId%22%3A%2268ff3f728700e8c4733b6ad8%22%7D%5D" href="#" class="btn-icon modal w-inline-block"><div class="code-embed-2 w-embed"><svg width="11" height="11" viewBox="0 0 11 11" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

</svg></div></a></div></div><div class="people-item__bio-w"><div class="text-size-small">Bio</div><div class="text-size-regular w-richtext"><p>Beau-Anne Chilla is a Partner at FORWARD.one, a deeptech venture capital firm specialised in hardware propositions. She holds an Msc in Industrial Engineering from the University of Groningen and started her career at Adyen before moving into venture capital. Besides her work as an investor she sits on the board of the Dutch semipublic sustainability institution Milieu Centraal.</p></div></div><a data-wf-native-id-path="39566151-72f7-7257-7483-0857e90b1b20_instance-2" data-wf-ao-click-engagement-tracking="true" data-wf-element-id="39566151-72f7-7257-7483-0857e90b1b20" data-wf-cms-context="%5B%7B%22collectionId%22%3A%2268ef71c634061d6e61fc166e%22%2C%22itemId%22%3A%2268ff3faee0b7433b8d3241b1%22%7D%5D" href="#" class="btn-icon modal w-inline-block"><div class="code-embed-2 w-embed"><svg width="11" height="11" viewBox="0 0 11 11" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

</svg></div></a></div></div><div class="people-item__bio-w"><div class="text-size-small">Bio</div><div class="text-size-regular w-richtext"><p>Matthijs co-founded QuantWare and has since grown it into the world's leading quantum processor maker. He has a background in computer science and quantum information, with research experience in quantum simulation at QuTech. </p><p>As CEO, Matthijs drives QuantWare's strategic direction and growth, bridging deep-tech innovation with real-world industrial scalability. He is also a member of the TechChampions. In his free time, he loves hiking in the mountains.</p><p>‍</p></div></div><a data-wf-native-id-path="39566151-72f7-7257-7483-0857e90b1b20_instance-3" data-wf-ao-click-engagement-tracking="true" data-wf-element-id="39566151-72f7-7257-7483-0857e90b1b20" data-wf-cms-context="%5B%7B%22collectionId%22%3A%2268ef71c634061d6e61fc166e%22%2C%22itemId%22%3A%2268ef71c634061d6e61fc184c%22%7D%5D" href="#" class="btn-icon modal w-inline-block"><div class="code-embed-2 w-embed"><svg width="11" height="11" viewBox="0 0 11 11" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

He is an author of the landmark Google Quantum Supremacy paper and serves as a lead researcher at Google Quantum AI. He is also a Director at the Peter Grünberg Institute, contributing to the global advancement of quantum technologies.</p></div></div><a data-wf-native-id-path="7285ebb4-ffa6-b2a1-e3ed-fedfa3ed0ac7_instance-0" data-wf-ao-click-engagement-tracking="true" data-wf-element-id="7285ebb4-ffa6-b2a1-e3ed-fedfa3ed0ac7" data-wf-cms-context="%5B%7B%22collectionId%22%3A%2268ef71c634061d6e61fc166e%22%2C%22itemId%22%3A%2268ff34b0e79a1b8bcd84ec41%22%7D%5D" href="#" class="btn-icon modal w-inline-block"><div class="code-embed-2 w-embed"><svg width="11" height="11" viewBox="0 0 11 11" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

Marcus is an internationally recognized leader in quantum engineering. He previously served as Director of Microsoft Quantum, the Peter Grünberg Institute, and the Harvard Center for Nanoscale Systems. He is currently a professor at the Niels Bohr Institute and was the first non-Dane to receive the prestigious Ørsted Gold Medal.</p></div></div><a data-wf-native-id-path="7285ebb4-ffa6-b2a1-e3ed-fedfa3ed0ac7_instance-1" data-wf-ao-click-engagement-tracking="true" data-wf-element-id="7285ebb4-ffa6-b2a1-e3ed-fedfa3ed0ac7" data-wf-cms-context="%5B%7B%22collectionId%22%3A%2268ef71c634061d6e61fc166e%22%2C%22itemId%22%3A%2268ff34b02042742525074b20%22%7D%5D" href="#" class="btn-icon modal w-inline-block"><div class="code-embed-2 w-embed"><svg width="11" height="11" viewBox="0 0 11 11" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

</svg></div></a></div></div><div class="people-item__bio-w"><div class="text-size-small">Bio</div><div class="w-richtext"><p>Matthijs co-founded QuantWare and has since grown it into the world's leading quantum processor maker. He has a background in computer science and quantum information, with research experience in quantum simulation at QuTech. </p><p>As CEO, Matthijs drives QuantWare's strategic direction and growth, bridging deep-tech innovation with real-world industrial scalability. He is also a member of the TechChampions. In his free time, he loves hiking in the mountains.</p><p>‍</p></div></div><a data-wf-native-id-path="1936c16f-9d76-040c-ee3d-163ba1ea16e3_instance-0" data-wf-ao-click-engagement-tracking="true" data-wf-element-id="1936c16f-9d76-040c-ee3d-163ba1ea16e3" data-wf-cms-context="%5B%7B%22collectionId%22%3A%2268ef71c634061d6e61fc166e%22%2C%22itemId%22%3A%2268ef71c634061d6e61fc184c%22%7D%5D" href="#" class="btn-icon modal w-inline-block"><div class="code-embed-2 w-embed"><svg width="11" height="11" viewBox="0 0 11 11" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

He previously served as CFO of MedAlliance and as Group Vice President of Finance at STMicroelectronics. Over his career, he has led more than $3 billion in M&A and financing transactions across high-growth technology sectors.</p></div></div><a data-wf-native-id-path="1936c16f-9d76-040c-ee3d-163ba1ea16e3_instance-2" data-wf-ao-click-engagement-tracking="true" data-wf-element-id="1936c16f-9d76-040c-ee3d-163ba1ea16e3" data-wf-cms-context="%5B%7B%22collectionId%22%3A%2268ef71c634061d6e61fc166e%22%2C%22itemId%22%3A%2269130eb51c3e6cf1f25f02e8%22%7D%5D" href="#" class="btn-icon modal w-inline-block"><div class="code-embed-2 w-embed"><svg width="11" height="11" viewBox="0 0 11 11" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

</svg></div></a></div></div><div class="people-item__bio-w"><div class="text-size-small">Bio</div><div class="w-richtext"><p>Toni leads QuantWare’s People & Culture team, with more than 20 years of international experience of shaping people-first strategy in fast growing companies. She’s British but in the last 15 years has lived and worked in Switzerland as well as the Netherlands, supporting teams in 25+ countries worldwide. Her indepth knowledge of how to scale culture, develop talent, and build diverse teams is invaluable for the future growth of QuantWare.</p></div></div><a data-wf-native-id-path="1936c16f-9d76-040c-ee3d-163ba1ea16e3_instance-3" data-wf-ao-click-engagement-tracking="true" data-wf-element-id="1936c16f-9d76-040c-ee3d-163ba1ea16e3" data-wf-cms-context="%5B%7B%22collectionId%22%3A%2268ef71c634061d6e61fc166e%22%2C%22itemId%22%3A%2269ae86afa6d9e44d7bcdcf35%22%7D%5D" href="#" class="btn-icon modal w-inline-block"><div class="code-embed-2 w-embed"><svg width="11" height="11" viewBox="0 0 11 11" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

</svg></div></a></div></div><div class="people-item__bio-w"><div class="text-size-small">Bio</div><div class="w-richtext"><p>Wouter Wesselink is VP of Product at QuantWare, where he leads product development. He holds a cum laude MSc in Applied Physics from TU Delft, specialising in quantum amplifiers. Before joining QuantWare, he headed a 150+ consultant non-profit strategy consulting firm. As one of QuantWare’s early team members, Wouter has played a pivotal role in scaling the company.</p></div></div><a data-wf-native-id-path="1936c16f-9d76-040c-ee3d-163ba1ea16e3_instance-6" data-wf-ao-click-engagement-tracking="true" data-wf-element-id="1936c16f-9d76-040c-ee3d-163ba1ea16e3" data-wf-cms-context="%5B%7B%22collectionId%22%3A%2268ef71c634061d6e61fc166e%22%2C%22itemId%22%3A%2268ef71c634061d6e61fc1802%22%7D%5D" href="#" class="btn-icon modal w-inline-block"><div class="code-embed-2 w-embed"><svg width="11" height="11" viewBox="0 0 11 11" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

</svg></div></a></div></div><div class="people-item__bio-w"><div class="text-size-small">Bio</div><div class="w-richtext"><p>With a background in quantum physics and superconducting qubit design, Marten has played a central role in the company’s QPU development. He brings a track record of innovation across aerospace, finance, and automotive, including his tenure as chief engineer of the Delft Solar Car Team, where he led the team to victory in the World Solar Challenge. As VP of R&D, Marten oversees technology development aimed at removing scaling bottlenecks and enabling QPUs to reach true utility scale.<br></p></div></div><a data-wf-native-id-path="1936c16f-9d76-040c-ee3d-163ba1ea16e3_instance-7" data-wf-ao-click-engagement-tracking="true" data-wf-element-id="1936c16f-9d76-040c-ee3d-163ba1ea16e3" data-wf-cms-context="%5B%7B%22collectionId%22%3A%2268ef71c634061d6e61fc166e%22%2C%22itemId%22%3A%2268ef71c634061d6e61fc183a%22%7D%5D" href="#" class="btn-icon modal w-inline-block"><div class="code-embed-2 w-embed"><svg width="11" height="11" viewBox="0 0 11 11" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

</svg></div></a></div></div><div class="people-item__bio-w"><div class="text-size-small">Bio</div><div class="w-richtext"><p>Joe leads QuantWare’s sales execution and customer engagement with more than 30 years of experience in the semiconductor and high-tech industries. He previously served as VP Sales & Marketing of two public companies (Tundra Semiconductor & Carsem Malaysia), where he was responsible for both achieving revenue targets and enabling higher levels of strategic customer engagement. He bring significant international experience with time spent in NA, EMEA and APAC.</p></div></div><a data-wf-native-id-path="1936c16f-9d76-040c-ee3d-163ba1ea16e3_instance-8" data-wf-ao-click-engagement-tracking="true" data-wf-element-id="1936c16f-9d76-040c-ee3d-163ba1ea16e3" data-wf-cms-context="%5B%7B%22collectionId%22%3A%2268ef71c634061d6e61fc166e%22%2C%22itemId%22%3A%22693295be0a34e497c7432e80%22%7D%5D" href="#" class="btn-icon modal w-inline-block"><div class="code-embed-2 w-embed"><svg width="11" height="11" viewBox="0 0 11 11" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

</svg></div></a></div></div><div class="people-item__bio-w"><div class="text-size-small">Bio</div><div class="w-richtext"><p>Bart is QuantWare's Head of Marketing, responsible for bringing QuantWare's technological advancements known to the wider community. He holds a master's degree in Applied Physics from the TU Delft, and completed his thesis at QuTech in the group of Prof. Leo DiCarlo. Before joining QuantWare, he gained diverse experience — from teaching physics to high-school students to exploring hedging strategies for exchange rate volatility at a global currency fund — giving him a unique interdisciplinary perspective. In his free time, he likes to run and play squash.</p></div></div><a data-wf-native-id-path="1936c16f-9d76-040c-ee3d-163ba1ea16e3_instance-9" data-wf-ao-click-engagement-tracking="true" data-wf-element-id="1936c16f-9d76-040c-ee3d-163ba1ea16e3" data-wf-cms-context="%5B%7B%22collectionId%22%3A%2268ef71c634061d6e61fc166e%22%2C%22itemId%22%3A%226932d29894df79088679c041%22%7D%5D" href="#" class="btn-icon modal w-inline-block"><div class="code-embed-2 w-embed"><svg width="11" height="11" viewBox="0 0 11 11" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

function initDynamicCurrentYear() {  
  const currentYear = new Date().getFullYear();
  const currentYearElements = document.querySelectorAll('[data-current-year]');
  currentYearElements.forEach(currentYearElement => {
    currentYearElement.textContent = currentYear;
  });
}

// Initialize Dynamic Current Year
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  initDynamicCurrentYear();
});
</script></div></div><div class="w-embed w-script"><script>

// Bio modal
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
  const peopleItems = document.querySelectorAll(".people-item");
  let activeModal = null;

  peopleItems.forEach(item => {
    const image = item.querySelector(".people-item__image-w");
    const modal = item.querySelector(".people-item__modal");
    const closeBtn = modal.querySelector(".btn-icon");

    // initial hidden state
    gsap.set(modal, { display: "none", opacity: 0 });

    // open on image click
    image.addEventListener("click", () => {
      // close any other active modal first
      if (activeModal && activeModal !== modal) {
        closeModal(activeModal);
      }

      // open if not active, close if already active
      if (activeModal === modal) {
        closeModal(modal);
        activeModal = null;
      } else {
        openModal(modal);
        activeModal = modal;
      }
    });

    // close on close button click
    closeBtn.addEventListener("click", () => {
      closeModal(modal);
      activeModal = null;
    });
  });

  // GSAP open animation
  function openModal(modal) {
    gsap.set(modal, { display: "block" });
    gsap.to(modal, { opacity: 1, duration: 0.4, ease: "power2.out" });
  }

  // GSAP close animation
  function closeModal(modal) {
    gsap.to(modal, {
      opacity: 0,
      duration: 0.3,
      ease: "power2.inOut",
      onComplete: () => gsap.set(modal, { display: "none" })
    });
  }
});
</script></div><div data-popup="" class="popup-w"><div class="hide w-embed w-script"><script>
window.addEventListener("load", () => {

  // === UNIQUE POPUP ID (set this per popup instance) ===
  const POPUP_ID = "general-popup";  
  // Do not use empty spaces (spacebar) in the name.
  // Examples:
  // const POPUP_ID = "technology";
  // const POPUP_ID = "welcome-popup";

  const popup = document.querySelector("[data-popup]");
  const closeBtn = document.querySelector("[data-popup-close]");

  // === Timings ===
  const POPUP_DELAY = 5000;  // Delay before popup shows (ms). Only write values in miliseconds (ms) 
  const POPUP_REAPPEAR_TIME = "1d"; // How long until the popup reappears after closing
  																	// Use: "3d", "24h", "30m", "10s", etc.

  // Convert readable duration into milliseconds
  function convertTime(str) {
    const num = parseInt(str);
    if (str.endsWith("d")) return num * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000;
    if (str.endsWith("h")) return num * 60 * 60 * 1000;
    if (str.endsWith("m")) return num * 60 * 1000;
    if (str.endsWith("s")) return num * 1000;
    return num; // fallback to ms
  }

  const REAPPEAR_MS = convertTime(POPUP_REAPPEAR_TIME);

  // Unique key for this popup instance
  const STORAGE_KEY = `popupClosedAt_${POPUP_ID}`;

  // Check last time THIS popup was closed
  const lastClosed = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
  const now = Date.now();

  if (lastClosed && now - lastClosed < REAPPEAR_MS) {
    return;
  }

  // === SHOW POPUP AFTER DELAY ===
  setTimeout(() => {
    popup.style.display = "flex";  // show element first

    gsap.fromTo(
      popup,
      {
        y: 200,      
        opacity: 0
      },
      {
        y: 0,
        opacity: 1,
        duration: 1.2,
        ease: "power3.out"
      }
    );
  }, POPUP_DELAY);

  // === CLOSE POPUP ===
  function closePopup() {
    gsap.to(popup, {
      y: 200,
      opacity: 0,
      duration: 0.6,
      ease: "power3.in",
      onComplete: () => {
        popup.style.display = "none";
      }
    });

    // Save timestamp of closing for reappear logic
    localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, Date.now());
  }

  closeBtn.addEventListener("click", (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    closePopup();
  });

});
</script></div><div class="popup-text-w"><div class="popup-header">Hyperscaling quantum processors with VIO™</div><div class="popup-content-text">Explore the architecture, economics, and production
